storyline: Deca-Dence (TV Series 2020): Deca-Dence Season 1 is one of those anime that grabs your attention from the very first episode and keeps surprising you all the way through. Set in a future where humans live inside a massive moving fortress to survive against strange monsters called Gadoll, it starts off like a classic action story—but then, boom, there’s a mind-blowing twist that flips everything you thought you knew! The main duo, Natsume, a brave girl who never gives up, and Kaburagi, a tough but caring mentor, make the story really shine. Their journey is full of heart, humor, and some awesome fight scenes. The animation pops with color, the world feels alive, and the music hits at just the right moments. Sure, a few parts slow down a bit, but the ending ties it all together beautifully.

storyline: An Joon-Ho (Jung Hae-In) is a soldier. He is quiet and calm, but inflexible. Sergeant Park Beom-Goo (Kim Sung-Kyun) notices Private An Joon-Ho's tenacity and ability to observe. He transfers An Joon-Ho to the D.P. (Deserter Pursuit) team. Their mission is to catch deserters. An Joon-Ho works with Sergeant Park Beom-Goo and Corporal Han Ho-Yeol (Koo Gyo-Hwan) on the team. Sergeant Park Beom-Goo looks tired all the time. He curses and nags at An Joon-Ho and Han Ho-Yeol, but he also takes care of them with his keen insight. Han Ho-Yeol sometimes gives An Joon-Ho investigative know-how, but he sometimes annoys him. Meanwhile, First Lieutenant Im Ji-Seob (Son Seok-Koo) only cares about his success in the military. He does not care for the D.P. team.
